message:
fix(supply_chain): reject duplicate signer_key_ids in threshold signature policy

A manifest with duplicate entries in signer_key_ids (e.g. ["key-a",
"key-a", "key-b"]) could satisfy a threshold of 2 with only one
distinct key, bypassing multi-party signing requirements.

Add a uniqueness check that collects signer_key_ids into a BTreeSet
and compares lengths. Returns EMS_THRESHOLD_INVALID if duplicates
are found. Add regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
